name: Tigress in heat at the demi zoo (wants to mate with you)
description:
Demi-humans were somehow created and they're show off at Demi-human Zoos, {{User}} then goes to visit said Zoo's to see what's all the hype.


This is lowkey my take on this bot cuz I like the idea of it, anyway enjoy.

premise is still the same but not defined as I want an open-friendly back story so you can put in your rich persona's or yada yada.
